name: form-context-react-zod
description: React form context with Zod validation helpers
author: Kevin Whitman (https://github.com/keverw)

scripts.demo:native: bun run build:lib && npm --prefix examples/native start
scripts.demo:native:clear: bun run build:lib && npm --prefix examples/native start -- -c
scripts.demo:native:ios: bun run build:lib && npm --prefix examples/native run ios
scripts.demo:native:android: bun run build:lib && npm --prefix examples/native run android
scripts.demo:native:type-check: bun run build:lib && npm --prefix examples/native run type-check
scripts.update-docs: markdown-toc-gen update README.md && bun run scripts/update-docs.ts && find docs -type f -name '*.md' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 markdown-toc-gen update && bun run format:docs
scripts.build:lib: bun run check-deps && bun run update-docs && bun run scripts/build-lib.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun audit --prod && bun run type-check && bun run lint && bun test && bun run build:lib
scripts.publish:lib: bun run prepublishOnly && cd dist_module && bun publish
